comments.body: I am fine with doing this.  Did we ever use buildah in testling podman?
@rhatdan At one point, I believe building/installing buildah was required though I can't recall whatfor.  I made this PR at the request of @baude so I'll let him answer on the details.

***Note: *** leaving this as a WIP, since only the cache-image build workflow ran.  I want to run the normal workflow with the new images.  Since master is currently broken, will need to rebase this anyway, so it's on hold for now.
@haircommander FYI - this PR will clash with your #3143

@haircommander actually worse, it could ***silently*** clash - there are no checks that verify the currently running VM images match the code which produced them...which would be an interesting trick if it could be done somehow.
@cevich is this only an issue if it gets merged, or are we both creating competing VMs that effect each other while the PRs are in flight?
@haircommander I was thinking around merge-time it could be a problem...if the second-to-merge didn't rebuild + update the VM image names, but only fixes the build code.
mine should be second, so I'll just have to remember to rebuild :) thanks for the warning
Ref: Mr. @baude asked for this PR
